.file-embed.background: rgb(32, 35, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.background: rgb(27, 28, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.internal-embed.is-loaded.background: rgb(27, 28, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.markdown-embed.background: rgb(27, 28, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(29, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(32, 35, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(29, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(29, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.font-family: "??", maplemono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgba(103, 136, 162, 0.85) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgba(97, 131, 158, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-complex.suggestion-item.background: rgba(97, 131, 158, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(29, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(29, 32, 32) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(86, 115, 140, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(27, 28, 29) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(33, 33, 33) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
kbd.font-family: system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "??", maplemono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

pre.background: rgb(32, 35, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(32, 35, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js code span.font-family: "??", maplemono, ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, "Source Code Pro", monospace

th.background: rgb(32, 35, 37) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
